title: Product request: ability to drag/drop and reorder entire blocks of conditional/branching questions within form builder
excerpt: While the form builder currently allows you to drag/drop and reorder the main question blocks and you can reorder the individual questions underneath that conditional question…however once you start building out multiple…

posts.author: samspacher (Shannon)
posts.cookedHtml: While the form builder currently allows you to drag/drop and reorder the main question blocks and you can reorder the individual questions underneath that conditional question…however once you start building out multiple conditional questions based off the different answers, those “blocks” of conditional questions are set in the order in which they were set up and there’s no way to reorder the entire block of conditional questions. This feature would be super helpful as it’s not always apparent when first building a form what the flow of those branching questions should be and having the functionality to be able to drag and drop the entire conditional question block to reorder it would be super helpful.

posts.author: Helene (Hélène Drouin)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update about this feature? It’s still an issue.
